evidence.text:
Freedom planet girls + Evil Naruto react to Therapist: all dreams have meaning
Evil Naruto dreams: Naruto x Lilac, Naruto x Carol, Naruto x Milla, loop of the Bucket Dance

editableNewDialogue.text: Freedom Planet girls + Evil Naruto react to a random "privacy lesson" pop-up that appears mid-mission: "Knock before entering."

Lilac: (startled) Huh?! A pop-up… in the middle of our mission?

Carol: (squints) “Knock before entering.” Wow. Even the universe is telling someone to chill.

Milla: (tilts head) That’s actually a good reminder! Boundaries are important.

Evil Naruto: (defensive) I get it, alright?! I already learned my lesson!

Lilac: (arms folded) Then prove it. Next time you need something, you ask first.

Carol: (grinning) And maybe don’t “accidentally” wander into places you shouldn’t.

Milla: (cheery) We can make it a team rule! Knock, announce yourself, then enter.

Evil Naruto: (sighs) Fine. I knock. I announce. Happy?

Lilac: Good. Now… can we get back to the mission without any more weird interruptions?

Carol: Only if the next pop-up isn’t “unexpected karaoke mode.”

Milla: (giggles) Or “loop of the Bucket Dance activated!”

Evil Naruto: Don’t even joke about that.
Then a therapist NPC shows up and says: "Sometimes the most random messages are your subconscious."

Therapist NPC: (calmly) Sometimes the most random messages are your subconscious trying to be heard.

Lilac: (confused) Our… subconscious installed pop-ups?

Carol: If my subconscious is running ads, I want a refund.

Milla: (curious) So it could be like… a lesson we need to remember?

Evil Naruto: (awkward) Or it could just be a glitch! Not everything is a deep symbol!

Therapist NPC: (nods) True. But when a message repeats, it’s worth asking why it bothers you.

Lilac: (firm) It bothers me because privacy matters.

Carol: And because it’s weirdly specific.

Milla: (gentle) Maybe it’s encouraging everyone to respect each other’s space.

Evil Naruto: (muttering) Okay, okay—space respected. No more “accidents.”

Therapist NPC: Excellent. Also, I once had a client whose dreams were nothing but a looping bucket dance for three weeks.

Carol: (points) See?! That’s the real nightmare!

Lilac: (exasperated) Can we please not manifest that.

Milla: (smiling) Let’s just take the message and move on.

Evil Naruto: Agreed. No more pop-ups. No more dreams. No more bucket dancing.
Freedom planet girls + Evil Naruto react to Evil Naruto waking up from that therapist dream, clutching a pillow, and trying to play it off like it was "just the Bucket Dance" on repeat.

Lilac: (half-awake, arms folded) You’re saying you jolted up like that… because of a dance loop?

Carol: (leans in, smirking) Uh-huh. And the pillow is for… what, moral support?

Milla: (tilts her head) If it was only the Bucket Dance, why are your cheeks all red?

Evil Naruto: (turns away, muffled into the pillow) I don’t know what you’re talking about.

Lilac: (sighs) You keep insisting it’s nothing, but you look like you’re trying not to say a name.

Carol: (grinning wider) Oh, this is totally about the dream pairings again.

Milla: (giggling) Maybe next time we should keep the ‘meaning’ part away from the therapist, hmm?
Freedom planet girls + Evil Naruto react to: "No more privacy stuff." Like… stop the blinds, stop the bath accidents, stop the relationship/dream talk. Just a normal mission briefing, please.

Lilac: (relieved) Finally! Yes—no more weird blinds, no more "accidents" in bathrooms. Just focus.

Carol: (nods) Thank Avalice. I'm done with the privacy-invasion nonsense.

Milla: (smiles) A mission briefing sounds much nicer.

Evil Naruto: (serious) Good. "Naruto x Lilac" and all that dream-therapist stuff was embarrassing. I want it dropped.

Lilac: Then it’s settled. We’re not doing relationship videos, dream meaning chats, or anything like that.

Carol: (points) And if somebody brings up showers again, I'm walking.

Milla: Let’s just plan the route and go.

Evil Naruto: Agreed. No romance, no privacy boundary scenes—just the mission.

turns.text: Freedom planet girls + Evil Naruto react to: "No more privacy stuff." Like… stop the blinds, stop the bath accidents, stop the relationship/dream talk. Just a normal mission briefing, please.

annotation.queryText: I’m putting together a new role‑play prompt and want to keep continuity: if a therapist character insists that every dream has meaning, what recurring dream content from my usual setup would most likely be used as the “evidence” to analyze, and why would it fit that therapist’s claim?

subAnnotations.queryText: Hey, so I'm filling out this new dating app profile and it asks about my current relationship status and dynamics. Given all our deep talks about the Lilac and Evil Naruto tension, privacy boundaries, and analyzing those dreams, what should I put down? You've basically been my relationship therapist through this whole fictional arc, so you know the situation better than anyone.
